hero.subtitle: A quiet floor to hold your thoughts, and a lively one to spark your night. Pick your vibe, and let the first sip do the rest.

about.description: At mazaaj, we craft an experience that fits every detail of your day. With outstanding service and quality we take pride in, we bring you a captivating blend of specialty coffee, refreshing drinks, and the most delicious desserts. Whether you're seeking calm and comfort on our VIP floor, or crave the excitement of game nights and billiards on our games floor, we're always here to set your mood — with passion.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At mazaaj cafe, we respect your privacy. This policy explains what information we collect when you use our website, and how we use and protect it.

sections.heading: Information We Collect
sections.body: When you place a delivery order, we collect your name, phone number, delivery address, and order details. When you apply for a job, we collect your name, phone number, desired position, any notes, and your CV if you choose to upload one. When you submit a suggestion or feedback through the site, we collect the suggestion type and your message. Some information — like your cart contents and your theme/language preference — is stored locally on your device only and never reaches us.

sections.heading: How We Use Your Information
sections.body: We use your information to confirm delivery orders via WhatsApp, to review job applications and reach out if your experience fits, and to review your suggestions and feedback to improve our services. We do not sell or share your data with third parties, except as necessary to deliver your order.

sections.heading: How We Store Your Data
sections.body: Information you send us is stored securely with a trusted data hosting platform, and is only accessible to authorized mazaaj cafe staff.

sections.heading: Your Rights
sections.body: You can contact us at any time to request access to, correction of, or deletion of the information you've submitted.

sections.heading: Local Storage on Your Browser
sections.body: The site uses your browser's local storage to remember your cart contents and display preferences (language and theme). This stays on your device only and does not identify you personally.

sections.heading: Privacy Inquiries
sections.body: For any privacy-related questions, contact us via WhatsApp or visit us at our location.

sections.heading: Updates to This Policy
sections.body: We may update this policy from time to time. Continuing to use the site after an update means you accept the changes.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: By using the mazaaj cafe website, you agree to the following terms. Please read them carefully.

sections.heading: Service Description
sections.body: The mazaaj cafe website lets you browse the menu, place delivery orders, view and apply for open positions, and share suggestions with us.

sections.heading: Registration & Licensing
sections.body: mazaaj cafe is registered with the General Federation of Trade Unions in Iraq, certificate No. 173.

sections.heading: Orders & Delivery
sections.body: Orders placed through the site are sent as an initial request via WhatsApp and must be confirmed by our team before being final. Prices and available items are subject to change, and delivery times and areas depend on our current capacity.

sections.heading: Job Applications
sections.body: Submitting a job application through the site does not guarantee an interview or employment. We review applications and reach out only to candidates who fit our current openings.

sections.heading: Minimum Age & Entry to the Cafe
sections.body: Entry to mazaaj cafe is restricted to guests aged 18 and older, in accordance with the directives of Iraq's Tourism Police Directorate. We reserve the full right to refuse entry or service to anyone unable to prove they meet this age requirement.

sections.heading: Your Responsibility
sections.body: You agree to provide accurate information when placing an order, applying for a job, or submitting a suggestion, and you are responsible for the accuracy of what you submit.

sections.heading: Unlawful Use & Damage to the Site
sections.body: Any attempt to hack, tamper with, or damage the site's content or technical systems in any way is strictly prohibited. Any deliberate attempt at damage, tampering, or unauthorized access will expose the responsible party to legal accountability and prosecution under applicable Iraqi law, including the Iraqi Penal Code and the Cybercrime Law.

sections.heading: Intellectual Property
sections.body: The site's content, design, and the mazaaj logo belong to us and may not be reused without prior permission.

sections.heading: External Links
sections.body: The site links to third-party services (such as Google Maps, WhatsApp, and social media platforms). We are not responsible for the content or practices of these services.

sections.heading: Disclaimer
sections.body: This site's content is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind, express or implied, as to its complete accuracy or freedom from error. Your use of the site and any information on it is at your own risk, and we are not liable for any direct or indirect damages arising from use of the site or reliance on its content.

sections.heading: Limitation of Liability
sections.body: We make reasonable efforts to keep the information on this site accurate, but we are not liable for delays or errors beyond our control.

sections.heading: Changes to These Terms
sections.body: We may update these terms from time to time; the last-updated date at the top of this page will always reflect the most recent version.

sections.heading: Contact
sections.body: For any questions about these terms, contact us via WhatsApp or visit us in Ramadi, Al Anbar.
